Bash("/mnt/c/Users/linwa/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe" -c "
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import requests

def try_company\(name, subdomain, wd_ver, site, tenant=None\):
    if tenant is None:
        tenant = subdomain
    careers = f'https://{subdomain}.{wd_ver}.myworkdayjobs.com/en-US/{site}'
    api = f'https://{subdomain}.{wd_ver}.myworkdayjobs.com/wday/cxs/{tenant}/{site}/jobs'
    with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
        context = browser.new_context\(user_agent='Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120.0.0.0'\)
        page = context.new_page\(\)
        resp = page.goto\(careers, wait_until='domcontentloaded', timeout=20000\)
        page.wait_for_timeout\(2000\)
        cookies = context.cookies\(\)
        csrf = next\(\(c['value'] for c in cookies if c['name'] == 'CALYPSO_CSRF_TOKEN'\), None\)
        status = resp.status if resp else '?'
        print\(f'{name}: page={status}, csrf={csrf is not None}, url={page.url[:60]}'\)
        if csrf:
            session = requests.Session\(\)
            for c in cookies:
                session.cookies.set\(c['name'], c['value']\)
            r = session.post\(api, json={'appliedFacets':{}, 'limit':5, 'offset':0, 'searchText':''}, 
                           headers={'Content-Type':'application/json', 'Accept':'application/json', 'X-Calypso-CSRF-Token': csrf}, timeout=15\)
            print\(f'  API: {r.status_code}', r.json\(\).get\('total', '?'\) if r.ok else r.text[:50]\)
        context.close\(\)
        browser.close\(\)

try_company\('Northrop', 'northropgrumman', 'wd1', 'Northrop_Grumman_External_Site'\)
try_company\('SAIC', 'saic', 'wd5', 'SAIC_External'\)
try_company\('Booz Allen', 'boozallen', 'wd5', 'External'\)
try_company\('Capital One', 'capitalone', 'wd5', 'External'\)
" 2>&1)
